aiSummaryCN:
【技术观点】
短期内比特币价格可能会继续震荡。
【关键位置】
当前支撑位为65,000美元，阻力位为68,000美元。
【走势推演】
如果价格突破68,000美元，可能会继续上涨。
【一句提醒】
注意风险，做好仓位管理。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin's price may continue to fluctuate in the short term.
[Key Drivers]
Current support is at $65,000 and resistance is at $68,000.
[Outlook]
If the price breaks through $68,000, it may continue to rise.
[Reminder]
Be aware of the risks and manage your positions carefully.
